articles.author: Brian Stelter
articles.title: An extraordinary moment for America’s media elite is all too ordinary in America - CNN
articles.description: Thousands of media and political elites have now gone through what countless millions of other Americans have experienced in their schools, offices, malls and churches.
articles.content: What happened at the Washington Hilton on Saturday night might have seemed extraordinary because President Trump and so many people in the presidential line of succession were in the ballroom when sh… [+2623 chars]
